item.title: World's heaviest Ovarian Cancer Tumour News
item.meta: Ovarian Cancer Tumour, Gateway Clinics Coimbatore
item.metad: Gateway Clinics of Coimbatore, along with 6 Doctors Team, have successfully removed the World Heaviest Tumor (33.5 kg) from a 46 yrs old Lady Patient’s Abdomen through Surgery.
item.menu: World's heaviest Ovarian Cancer Tumour News
item.author: admin
item.customtitle: World's heaviest Ovarian Cancer Tumour removed by Gateway Clinics Doctors
